title: Freeriders
short: Meet at 8:00. 8:30 start from the TCS HQ to the descent.
long:
Meet-up: 8:00, parking lot by the TCS HQ.

Bring: water and a snack/energy bar.

Afterwards we’ll hang out with some food and drinks. If you won’t join the social part, please let us know in advance.

title: Škabrjelka — Trail Day
short: Group line inspections, safety briefing and hangout. Suitable for everyone.
long:
Schedule:

10:00 — meet-up + briefing
11:00 — guided rides (groups by level)
13:00 — hangout and Q&A

Safety: helmet required; pads recommended.

title: TCS ng Community Picnic
short: Casual get-together for members and friends. Food/drinks by agreement.
long:
Location: (add)

Bring: something for the grill or a drink.

If you’re coming, please send us an Instagram DM so we can plan roughly.

title: E-MTB Enduro European Cup & SloEnduro
short: **The TCS Society, from Nova Gorica**, is once again hosting the opening race of the **SloEnduro series** in Slovenia, on April 18th - 19th.
long:
**The TCS Society, from Nova Gorica**, is once again hosting the opening race of the **SloEnduro series** in Slovenia. This year’s event is particularly prestigious, as it hosts both the national series and the **E-MTB Enduro European Cup**, featuring two high-intensity "power stage" challenges.

The slopes above Nova Gorica provide the perfect terrain for a demanding, technical, and exciting competition. For e-categories, the two-day event kicks off on Saturday with "power stages" and continues on Sunday with the remaining challenges. One of the stages will exceed 6 minutes in length, serving as a true test of fitness and focus. Also returning is the legendary **"Borderless IX. Korpus"** stage on Mt. Sabotin, where the start in Italy and the finish in Slovenia merge into one unforgettable experience.

**More info:** [www.sloenduro.com](url)
